header: Maintenance 0800-1700 16th July. All services unavailable 0830-1230 on 20th July.
text: There will be an outage on 20th July for 4 hours starting at 0830 running until 1230. Followed by 1.5 days of at-risk time where the network connectivity may be interrupted for short periods of time. The maintenance is scheduled to complete at 1800 on the 21st July.
